query: Does the World Bank Pink Sheet (CMO Historical Data Monthly Excel file) contain a 'Sulphur (Tampa)' price series in USD/metric ton, as of mid-2026? Inspect the actual column headers in the official CMO-Historical-Data-Monthly.xlsx fertilizer group (Phosphate rock, DAP, TSP, Urea, Potassium chloride) to confirm whether a Sulphur/Sulfur column exists. If the series exists, what are its reported monthly values for Jan-Jun 2026?
answer:
## Summary

**Definitive finding: NO — there is no "Sulphur (Tampa)" price series in the World Bank Pink Sheet / CMO-Historical-Data-Monthly file as of mid-2026.**

I verified this against the two most recent official editions (April 2026 and June 2026 Pink Sheets, which share the identical structure and series definitions as the monthly Excel file):

- The **Fertilizers group contains exactly 5 series**, all in USD/metric ton: **DAP, Phosphate rock, Potassium chloride, TSP, and Urea (E. Europe)**.
- The "Description of Price Series" tab enumerates every series — **no sulphur, sulfur, or "Tampa" series appears anywhere** in the publication. (The word "sulfur" shows up only as a coal quality spec.)
- Since the series doesn't exist, **there are no Jan–Jun 2026 sulphur values.**

The premise of the question is false. For reference, I did extract the actual fertilizer values that *do* exist for 2026 (Jan–May; June monthly data is not yet published as of the June 2, 2026 edition). Fertilizer prices surged in Q2 2026 (index rose from 155 to a peak of 209 in April) amid Strait of Hormuz supply disruptions.

Sources:
- [CMO Pink Sheet April 2026](https://thedocs.worldbank.org/en/doc/74e8be41ceb20fa0da750cda2f6b9e4e-0050012026/related/CMO-Pink-Sheet-April-2026.pdf)
- [CMO Pink Sheet June 2026](https://thedocs.worldbank.org/en/doc/74e8be41ceb20fa0da750cda2f6b9e4e-0050012026/related/CMO-Pink-Sheet-June-2026.pdf)
- [CMO Historical Data Monthly (Excel)](https://thedocs.worldbank.org/en/doc/5d903e848db1d1b83e0ec8f744e55570-0350012021/related/CMO-Historical-Data-Monthly.xlsx)

sources.title: CMO Pink Sheet April 2026
sources.snippet: Fertilizers group: DAP, Phosphate rock, Potassium chloride, TSP, Urea (E. Europe). No sulphur/Tampa series. Jan-Mar 2026 monthly values shown.

sources.title: CMO Pink Sheet June 2026
sources.snippet: Latest edition dated June 2, 2026. Fertilizers group confirmed as DAP, Phosphate rock, Potassium chloride, TSP, Urea. Mar-May 2026 monthly values shown; no sulphur series.

sources.title: CMO Historical Data Monthly (Excel)
sources.snippet: Official monthly historical data file; same series/structure as the Pink Sheet PDFs.

sources.title: World Bank Commodities Price Data (The Pink Sheet)
Fertilizer prices surge as Strait of Hormuz disruptions tighten supplies

key_facts: The World Bank Pink Sheet Fertilizers group contains exactly 5 series: DAP, Phosphate rock, Potassium chloride, TSP, and Urea (E. Europe) — all in USD/metric ton.
There is NO Sulphur/Sulfur (Tampa) price series anywhere in the CMO Pink Sheet / CMO-Historical-Data-Monthly file as of mid-2026 (verified against April 2026 and June 2026 editions).
The word 'sulfur' appears only once, as a quality spec for Coal, South Africa ('sulfur less than 1%'); 'Tampa' does not appear as any series location.
The 'Description of Price Series' tab enumerates all series and confirms no sulphur series exists.
As of the latest June 2, 2026 edition, monthly fertilizer data is published through May 2026; June 2026 monthly values are not yet available.
DAP 2026 monthly ($/mt): Jan 619.2, Feb 626.5, Mar 658.3, Apr 725.3, May 769.5.
Phosphate rock held flat at 152.5 $/mt every month Jan-May 2026.
Potassium chloride 2026 ($/mt): Jan 366.0, Feb 372.5, Mar 380.6, Apr 401.3, May 405.0.
Urea E. Europe 2026 ($/mt): Jan 415.4, Feb 472.0, Mar 725.6, Apr 856.9, May 770.5.
The World Bank Fertilizers index (2010=100) rose sharply in Q2 2026: 183.0 (Mar), 208.7 (Apr), 199.7 (May), attributed to Strait of Hormuz supply disruptions.
